**Exit Code: 2 (Failure)**
### Passing Checks: - **Lint (ruff)**: All checks passed - **Format Check (ruff format)**: 1657 files already formatted - **AGENTS.md standard**: PASSED - **CLAUDE.md pairing**: All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired (19 files, 0 violations) - **Exec Reference Check**: OK - .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date - **Type Check (ty)**: All checks passed - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 5685 passed in 12.98s - **Tests (erk-dev)**: 136 passed in 4.59s - **Tests (erk-statusline)**: 115 passed in 0.86s - **Tests (erk-mcp)**: 24 passed (in progress when output cut off)

session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. Here's a summary of changes:
## Summary
PR #8887 submitted: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8887
### Files Changed
| File | Change | |------|--------| | `src/erk/tui/screens/plan_input_screen.py` | **New** — `PlanInputScreen` modal with TextArea, Ctrl+S submit, Escape cancel | | `src/erk/tui/commands/registry.py` | Added `incremental_dispatch` CommandDefinition (launch_key=`i`, requires OPEN PR) | | `src/erk/tui/operations/workers.py` | Added `_incremental_dispatch_async` worker (temp file + `erk exec incremental-dispatch`) | | `src/erk/tui/actions/palette.py` | Added handler + `_on_incremental_dispatch_result` callback using Option A (`_pending_dispatch_pr`) | | `src/erk/tui/screens/plan_detail_screen.py` | Added `incremental_dispatch` case that dismisses and delegates to app | | `src/erk/cli/commands/launch_cmd.py` | Removed dead `"modify_existing": "true"` from one-shot inputs | | `tests/tui/screens/test_plan_input_screen.py` | **New** — 4 unit tests for PlanInputScreen | | `tests/tui/commands/test_registry.py` | 6 new tests + updated 2 existing tests for incremental_dispatch | | `tests/tui/app/test_incremental_dispatch.py` | **New** — 2 integration tests for dispatch callback | | `tests/commands/launch/test_launch_cmd.py` | Updated to match `modify_existing` removal |
### CI Results
- All 5685 unit tests pass - Lint, format, and type checks all pass - Only pre-existing Prettier markdown issues remain (unrelated files)
